description: Novel Prep Math 6 placement — 20 constructed-response items from Part II of Placement_Middle_Level.tex.

brand.trust_line: Responses are saved for teacher review. Score bands follow the printed middle-level placement guide (16/20 to advance).
brand.trust_line_zh: 作答已保存供教师批阅。分数区间与纸质初中段分班测试说明一致（当前档位建议 16/20 及以上晋级）。

score_band_rubric.title: Below Math 6 readiness
score_band_rubric.headline: Strengthen Math 5 skills before Math 6.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 建议先巩固 Math 5 能力，再进入 Math 6。
score_band_rubric.summary: Printed guide: fewer than 12 correct in Part II suggests staying at or below Math 5.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方说明一致：Part II 正确题数不足 12 题时建议留在 Math 5 或以下补强。
highlights: Review multi-digit operations, fractions, and measurement.
Use Part I remediation if foundational gaps appear.
Teacher should grade written work using the printable answer key.

score_band_rubric.title: Borderline Math 6
score_band_rubric.headline: Near Math 6 readiness — targeted support recommended.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 接近 Math 6 门槛，建议针对性支持。
score_band_rubric.summary: Borderline band on Part II; confirm with teacher review before advancing.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: Part II 边缘区间；建议教师结合书写过程确认后再晋级。
highlights: Target missed items from this 20-question band.
Use the printable test for full five-band progression.

score_band_rubric.title: Math 6 ready
score_band_rubric.headline: Strong Math 6/5 readiness on this band.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 在本档位表现达到 Math 6 准备度。
score_band_rubric.summary: Printed guide: 16+ correct in Part II supports Math 6 placement.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方说明一致：Part II 达 16 题及以上支持 Math 6 分班。
highlights: Maintain fluency with fractions, decimals, and word problems.
Optional: take Math 7 placement when school recommends the next band.
Teacher grading of constructed responses confirms final placement.
